Meta.title: Minh Truong Doan - Front-end Developer
Meta.description: Front-end Developer with {years}+ years of experience leading teams and building scalable web & mobile applications with React, Next.js, Vue.js, Angular, and React Native.

Hero.name: Minh Truong Doan
Hero.tagline: I build performant, scalable web & mobile products.

About.label: About me
About.title: Crafting Front-end Systems that scale.
About.p1: I am a Front-end Developer with {years}+ years of professional experience in Web and Mobile Application Development, including {leadingYears}+ years of leading and mentoring teams of {teamMin}–{teamMax} engineers. I design scalable front-end architectures, drive technical decisions, and deliver high-quality products from concept to production.
About.p2: Highly proficient in modern front-end technologies and frameworks such as React, Angular and Vue.js, with extensive mobile development experience using React Native for both iOS and Android platforms. I focus on building performant, maintainable, and scalable applications with excellent user experience.
About.p3: I have led and contributed to complex products including e-commerce platforms, financial applications, financial trading platforms, and real-time systems. My responsibilities include system architecture design, performance optimization, real-time data handling, code quality enforcement, and cross-functional collaboration with Back-end, product, and design teams.
About.p4: I am passionate about improving engineering standards, mentoring developers, and driving continuous improvement in development processes and product quality.
About.highlightTitle: What I bring to the table

architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
architecture.desc: Module Federation, monorepos (Nx), micro-frontends, reusable design systems.

performance.title: Performance Engineering
performance.desc: Bundle splitting, lazy loading, real-time data streams, render-path optimization.

leadership.title: Team Leadership
leadership.desc: Led teams of {teamMin}–{teamMax} engineers, set coding standards, mentored juniors into seniors.

delivery.title: End-to-end Delivery
delivery.desc: From discovery to production - design, build, test, ship, observe.

Skills.label: Tech Stack
Skills.title: Tools I build with.
Skills.subtitle: Battle-tested in production across trading platforms, e-commerce, mobile apps and real-time systems.

Experience.label: Experience
Experience.title: Career Timeline
Experience.subtitle: {years} years building products. {leadingYears} years leading teams.

Projects.label: Featured projects
Projects.title: Selected Work
Projects.subtitle: A curated slice of the products I have shipped.

bitcastle-fx.name: Bitcastle FX
bitcastle-fx.summary: Global Forex trading platform powered by MetaQuotes 4/5 and AI.
bitcastle-fx.responsibilities: I led the team of 5 and owned delivery timeline. Base the project with Nx in a monorepo + micro-frontend architecture spanning Next.js and React + Vite shells. Established the testing pipeline with Jest for unit tests and Playwright for E2E. Adopted an AI-assisted coding / testing / review workflow with GitHub Copilot, Claude and other AI tools. Owned KYC, the deposit / withdraw flows and other features.

bitcastle.name: Bitcastle
bitcastle.summary: Full-featured cryptocurrency exchange with real-time order book.
bitcastle.responsibilities: I led the team of 6 and owned delivery timeline. Base the project on Nuxt.js, built the socket layer for real-time market data and integrated TradingView for the charting view. Owned spot trading, copy trading, the wallet (deposit / withdraw, transaction history) and other features.

dentity-kyc.name: Dentity
dentity-kyc.summary: Identity authentication platform handling verifications and payments.
dentity-kyc.responsibilities: I led the team of 5 and owned delivery timeline. Base 2 apps on Next.js (main site) and React (admin). On the main site, owned KYC via the client's KYC SDK, the Apple Pay / PayPal / Stripe checkout and other features. On the admin, owned KYC record management and other features.

yellow.name: Yellow
yellow.summary: E-commerce platform to wholesale all kinds of items in the Thai market.
yellow.responsibilities: I led the team of 8 and owned delivery timeline. Bootstrapped 3 apps: the Next.js storefront, the React seller console and the React operator admin. On the storefront, owned seller / buyer onboarding, the checkout flow and other features. On the seller console, owned inventory management, revenue analytics and other features. On the operator admin, owned the home page, promotions management and other features.

reddiz.name: ReddiZ
reddiz.summary: Mobile app for a Vietnamese telecommunications social network.
reddiz.responsibilities: On React Native, built custom layout primitives for the app shell, the social feed (post creation and editing), the telecom data management feature and other features.

appi-team.name: APPI Team
appi-team.summary: Internal governance & work management - a French Jira-style suite.
appi-team.responsibilities: I led the team of 4 and owned delivery timeline. Base the project with Angular 11. Owned task management, the timeline view and other features for this Jira-style internal governance tool.

chubb.name: Chubb
chubb.summary: Front-end work for the world's largest publicly traded P&C insurer.
chubb.responsibilities: On Angular + RxJS, built the admin side of the platform with customer management, multi-product insurance management and other features.

my-coach.name: My Coach
my-coach.summary: Personal trainer search platform for the Japanese market.
my-coach.responsibilities: On Next.js, built the landing page, the authentication flow and other features for this Japanese personal-trainer search platform.

viecnha-24h.name: ViecNha 24H
viecnha-24h.summary: On-demand household chores delivery & pickup mobile app.
viecnha-24h.responsibilities: Base the project with React Native and built the helper-side mobile app, owning the nearby-job discovery flow, salary / bonus tracking and other features.

photobook-ai.name: Photobook AI
photobook-ai.summary: Upload images and generate a printed photobook in a single click.
photobook-ai.responsibilities: On Next.js + Redux / Redux-saga, built the photo frame editor, the authentication flow and other features for the one-click photobook experience.

bicycle-blue-book.name: Bicycle Blue Book
bicycle-blue-book.summary: E-commerce platform to wholesale bicycle items in the US market.
bicycle-blue-book.responsibilities: On Next.js, owned multi-role user account management (personal, wholesaler, seller, company) and the PayPal / Stripe checkout. Integrated Socket.io and built the buyer-seller messaging feature. Also contributed to the admin (order management, inventory) and other features.

hate-crime-report.name: Hate Crime - Easy Report
hate-crime-report.summary: A powerful mobile tool to report hate crimes with ease and efficiency.
hate-crime-report.responsibilities: Led the team and owned delivery timeline. Base the project on React Native and built the full mobile client (React Query + Axios for data, Formik for forms, App Center for distribution) - owned crime reporting with report export, nearby hospital and police search via Google Maps, emergency alerts to relatives and other features. Also built a separate React + Vite admin console with TanStack Router for report moderation.

vity.name: Vity
vity.summary: Binary options trading platform with real-time analytics and secure execution.
vity.responsibilities: Delivered the deposit / withdraw flows across multiple payment methods, rebuilt the landing page, integrated a KLine chart with optimized indicators and trade execution and tuned the order display. Also contributed to the Next.js admin with user / nationality-based restrictions, payment-method management and other features.

com-nieu-viet.name: Cơm Niêu Việt
com-nieu-viet.summary: Zalo Mini App for a Vietnamese clay-pot rice restaurant - menu, ordering & loyalty.
com-nieu-viet.responsibilities: On the Zalo Mini App SDK + React stack, built the ordering flow, bank-transfer payment handling and other features - data with React Query, shared state with Recoil.

xlvphc.name: XLVPHC - Sóc Trăng
xlvphc.summary: Mobile app for Soc Trang police to manage administrative & criminal violations.
xlvphc.responsibilities: Solo-built the project on React Native, owning multi-category violation management, violation statistics, lookup by personal record and other features.

mechanics-marketplace.name: Mechanics Marketplace
mechanics-marketplace.summary: Marketplace website & mobile app for the auto repair industry.
mechanics-marketplace.responsibilities: Built the landing / home pages with Pug.js + Node.js for SSR, then owned the admin dashboard end-to-end (order, customer account, goods / services catalog and other features) with React + MobX for state.
